title: Jeremiah Owyang - AI Influencer, Investor, Llama Lounge Host, Speaker

source.description:
The future of AI, AI agents, the role of LLMs, search engines, toxic Bay Area culture, immigration, fundraising tips, and much more! 

In this insightful episode, we sit down with Silicon Valley veteran Jeremiah Owyang—a venture capitalist at Blitzscaling Ventures, global public speaker, and host of the popular AI startup series Llama Lounge.

We dive deep into the future of AI, the rise of AI Agents, the evolving role of LLMs, and the impact on search engines. Jeremiah also shares his take on the toxic culture in the Bay Area, the importance of immigrants in tech, and key fundraising tips for aspiring founders💡

At Blitzscaling Ventures, Jeremiah leads early-stage investments in AI startups with potential for explosive growth. With a successful track record since 2017, he’s got a wealth of knowledge to share on how to stand out as a founder, what investors look for, and why storytelling is critical in today’s startup world.

Thank you Codi for hosting us at one of your office spaces!
https://www.codi.com/

theme.summary: This transcript is fundamentally focused on business strategy, entrepreneurship, and startup development. The entire conversation covers Jeremiah Owyang's journey as an investor at Blitzscaling Ventures, extensively discussing core business concepts including: startup investing frameworks, venture capital decision-making, founder evaluation criteria, fundraising strategies, go-to-market approaches, business model development, event organizing as business networking, and entrepreneurial ecosystem building. While AI is discussed as an industry context (AI agents, copilots, market trends), the core content is about investment strategy, building successful businesses, evaluating startups, and business development - exactly the type of entrepreneurship, venture capital, and business strategy content that defines the existing business category, which already contains extensive content on startup strategy, fundraising, business models, and company building frameworks from other successful founders, investors, and business leaders.
